notifications.message: Earth Bridge Alliance transitioned from founding phase into legal registration execution after receiving signed founding documents.
JasperOS transitioned from monolithic state storage toward domain-based state providers while preserving ExecutiveStateProtocol compatibility.
Executive Office, JasperOS, and CompanyOS identities are separated as independent but connected layers.

dashboard.highlight: Signed founding documents received. Earth Bridge Alliance has completed its founding phase and entered legal registration execution.
dashboard.alert: Vinyiabtumayokan execution requires improved coordination cadence with Johan and remaining external confirmations.
dashboard.secondary_highlight: JasperOS Executive Cockpit is evolving into a protocol-driven executive operating interface.
